SEARCH
程序包 com.example.syntaxappproject

类 NotificationAdapter

java.lang.Object
androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView.Adapter<com.example.syntaxappproject.NotificationAdapter.NotificationViewHolder>
com.example.syntaxappproject.NotificationAdapter
public class NotificationAdapter extends androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView.Adapter<com.example.syntaxappproject.NotificationAdapter.NotificationViewHolder>
RecyclerView.Adapter for displaying Notification objects in the admin browse notifications screen and the user notification inbox.

Each row inflates item_notification.xml and displays:

  • The sender label — "From: ADMINISTRATION" for admin notifications, or the event name for organizer notifications.
  • The notification title.
  • The message body.
  • A human-readable relative timestamp (e.g. "5m ago", "3h ago", "Mar 28").
  • An unread dot indicator, always visible.

The adapter does not handle click events — it is a display-only component. Call setNotifications(List) to replace the full list and trigger a full refresh via RecyclerView.Adapter.notifyDataSetChanged().

另请参阅:
  • Notification
  • NotificationAdapter.NotificationViewHolder

  • 构造器详细资料

    • NotificationAdapter

      public NotificationAdapter()
      Required empty public constructor.

  • 方法详细资料

    • onCreateViewHolder

      @NonNull public com.example.syntaxappproject.NotificationAdapter.NotificationViewHolder onCreateViewHolder(@NonNull android.view.ViewGroup parent, int viewType)
      Inflates the item_notification layout and returns a new NotificationAdapter.NotificationViewHolder.
      指定者:
      onCreateViewHolder 在类中 androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView.Adapter<com.example.syntaxappproject.NotificationAdapter.NotificationViewHolder>
      参数:
      parent - the parent ViewGroup
      viewType - unused — only one view type is supported
      返回:
      a new NotificationAdapter.NotificationViewHolder wrapping the inflated view

    • onBindViewHolder

      public void onBindViewHolder(@NonNull com.example.syntaxappproject.NotificationAdapter.NotificationViewHolder holder, int position)
      Binds a Notification to the given NotificationAdapter.NotificationViewHolder.

      If the notification's senderRole is "ADMIN", the sender label is set to "From: ADMINISTRATION". Otherwise the event name is used, falling back to "From: Unknown Event" if it is null or empty.

      指定者:
      onBindViewHolder 在类中 androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView.Adapter<com.example.syntaxappproject.NotificationAdapter.NotificationViewHolder>
      参数:
      holder - the view holder to bind data into
      position - the index of the notification in the list

    • getItemCount

      public int getItemCount()
      Returns the total number of notifications currently held by the adapter.
      指定者:
      getItemCount 在类中 androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView.Adapter<com.example.syntaxappproject.NotificationAdapter.NotificationViewHolder>
      返回:
      the size of the notifications list

    • setNotifications

      public void setNotifications(List<Notification> notifications)
      Replaces the current list of notifications with a new one and triggers a full RecyclerView refresh. Passing null clears the list.
      参数:
      notifications - the new list to display, or null to clear
